message:
refactor(ondisk): replace InvalidField string variant with typed InvalidMagic error

Update ext4 superblock validation test: the expected error variant
changed from ParseError::InvalidField { field: "s_magic", reason: ... }
to ParseError::InvalidMagic { expected, actual } with a pattern guard
checking the typed values. This reflects a refactoring of the error enum
from stringly-typed variants to structured typed variants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
